projects.title: Multilingual Legal Document Intelligence System
projects.description: A RAG pipeline (FAISS + LangChain) for multilingual legal-document search and Q&A, using PaddleOCR for layout-aware extraction and FastAPI for scalable inference endpoints.

projects.title: GravWaveFormer — GW Detection Ensemble
projects.description: A CNN-Transformer + GraphSAGE ensemble for gravitational-wave detection — 0.934 ROC-AUC at under 2 ms inference latency — with GradCAM explainability, ablation studies and an interactive Streamlit dashboard.

projects.title: Cross-Camera Player Mapping
projects.description: A computer-vision tracking pipeline (YOLOv11 + Deep SORT with ResNet-based Re-ID) reaching 95% cross-camera ID consistency for player mapping.

projects.title: Plant Disease Detection
projects.description: A CNN classifier with transfer learning that identifies plant diseases from leaf images.

projects.title: Diabetic Retinopathy Screening
projects.description: A deep-learning model for diabetic-retinopathy detection, reaching 94.7% accuracy on retinal images.

projects.title: Emotion Detection
projects.description: A CNN-based facial-emotion classifier for real-time emotion recognition.

projects.title: Speech-To-Speech Multilingual Translation
projects.description: A real-time speech-translation app with voice cloning for Indian languages, built on HuggingFace models and the Google API.
